name: unoverse
description: Unoverse JS channel SDKs — @gravity-platform/unoverse-core + @gravity-platform/unoverse-react. Native SDKs (flutter/swift/kotlin) live in their own repos under the gravity-platform org.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @gravity-platform/unoverse-core && npm run build -w @gravity-platform/unoverse-react
scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @gravity-platform/unoverse-core & npm run dev -w @gravity-platform/unoverse-react
